ddls:
CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the facility is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the facility is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the facility */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the facility */,
  "current_population" INTEGER /* Current population of the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the case occurred */,
  "case_type" TEXT /* Type of case (staff or detainee) */,
  "case_type_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the case type */,
  "case_date" TEXT /* Date the case was reported */,
  "number_of_cases" INTEGER /* Number of cases reported */,
  "case_status" TEXT /* Status of the case */,
  "case_source" TEXT /* Source of the infection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deaths" (
  "death_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each death */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the death occurred */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date the death was reported */,
  "number_of_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths reported */,
  "death_cause" TEXT /* Cause of death */,
  "death_type" TEXT /* Type of individual who died */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("death_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deaths_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccinations" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the vaccination occurred */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date the vaccination was administered */,
  "number_of_vaccinations" INTEGER /* Number of vaccinations administered */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine administered */,
  "vaccination_doses" INTEGER /* Number of doses administered */,
  "vaccination_completion_date" TEXT /* Date when vaccination was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccinations_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the test was administered */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was administered */,
  "number_of_tests" INTEGER /* Number of tests administered */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test administered */,
  "test_results" TEXT /* Results of the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the facility */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the facility was accessed */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Length of time the user accessed the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_user_access_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)
column_names: City where the facility is located
State where the facility is located
ID of the facility where the case occurred
Additional details about the case type
ID of the facility where the death occurred
ID of the facility where the vaccination occurred
ID of the facility where the test was administered
Unique identifier for each access event
ID of the user accessing the facility
Length of time the user accessed the facility
